Module com.cuatrifasico.battleshi
Package com.cuatrifasico.battleshi.model.entities

Class Board

java.lang.Object
com.cuatrifasico.battleshi.model.entities.Board
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable
public final class Board extends Object implements Serializable
Represents a 10x10 board: the grid of Cell objects and the fleet of Ship instances placed on it. Encapsulates every placement and shooting rule so that neither the controller nor the view need to know how the grid is internally organized.
See Also:

    Creates an empty 10x10 board with every cell set to water.

    Removes a previously placed ship from the board: clears every cell it occupied back to water and drops it from the fleet.

    Ensures none of the projected cells overlap an existing ship and that no projected cell is orthogonally or diagonally adjacent to an already-placed ship.

    • serialVersionUID

      private static final long serialVersionUID
      See Also:
      • Constant Field Values

    • grid

      private final Cell[][] grid

    • fleet

      private final Set<Ship> fleet

  • Constructor Details

    • Board

      public Board()
      Creates an empty 10x10 board with every cell set to water.

  • Method Details

    • getCell

      public Cell getCell(Coordinate coordinate)
      Parameters:
      coordinate - The position to look up.
      Returns:
      The cell located at the given coordinate.

    • getFleet

      public Set<Ship> getFleet()
      Returns:
      An unmodifiable-in-spirit view of every ship placed on this board. Callers should not mutate the returned collection directly.

    • placeShip

      public Ship placeShip(ShipType shipType, Coordinate head, Orientation orientation) throws InvalidPlacementException
      Validates and places a ship of the given type on the board.
      Parameters:
      shipType - The type of ship to place.
      head - The coordinate of the ship's first cell.
      orientation - The direction the ship extends towards from head.
      Returns:
      The newly created and placed Ship.
      Throws:
      InvalidPlacementException - If the ship would go out of bounds, overlap another ship, or touch an adjacent ship (including diagonally).

    • removeShip

      public void removeShip(Ship ship)
      Removes a previously placed ship from the board: clears every cell it occupied back to water and drops it from the fleet. Used by the placement phase to "pick up" a ship before moving it elsewhere, and to fully reset the board.
      Parameters:
      ship - The ship to remove; must currently belong to this board's fleet.

    • canPlace

      public boolean canPlace(ShipType shipType, Coordinate head, Orientation orientation)
      Non-mutating check for whether a ship of the given type could be placed at the given head/orientation right now, without actually placing it. Used by the placement phase to preview valid/invalid drop targets as the player hovers the board.
      Parameters:
      shipType - The ship type to test.
      head - The candidate head coordinate.
      orientation - The candidate orientation.
      Returns:
      true if placeShip(com.cuatrifasico.battleshi.model.enums.ShipType, com.cuatrifasico.battleshi.model.entities.Coordinate, com.cuatrifasico.battleshi.model.enums.Orientation) would currently succeed with these exact arguments.

    • projectCells

      private List<Coordinate> projectCells(ShipType shipType, Coordinate head, Orientation orientation) throws InvalidPlacementException
      Projects the list of coordinates a ship of the given type and orientation would occupy, starting from its head cell.
      Parameters:
      shipType - The ship type (defines how many cells to project).
      head - The starting coordinate.
      orientation - The direction to project towards.
      Returns:
      The ordered list of coordinates the ship would occupy.
      Throws:
      InvalidPlacementException - If any projected cell falls outside the board.

    • validatePlacement

      private void validatePlacement(List<Coordinate> projectedCells) throws InvalidPlacementException
      Ensures none of the projected cells overlap an existing ship and that no projected cell is orthogonally or diagonally adjacent to an already-placed ship.
      Parameters:
      projectedCells - The coordinates the candidate ship would occupy.
      Throws:
      InvalidPlacementException - If the placement violates any rule.

    • receiveShot

      public CellState receiveShot(Coordinate coordinate)
      Fires a shot at the given coordinate, updating the cell's state and, if applicable, the affected ship's hit registry.
      Parameters:
      coordinate - The target coordinate.
      Returns:
      The resulting CellState: CellState.MISS, CellState.HIT or CellState.SUNK.
      Throws:
      AlreadyShotException - If the given coordinate was already fired upon.

    • isFleetDestroyed

      public boolean isFleetDestroyed()
      Returns:
      true if every ship in this board's fleet is sunk.
